---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: minty
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */

.navbar{
  background-color:#0b3d2e !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid #14532d;
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:white !important;
  font-weight:600;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#bbf7d0 !important;
}

/* ===== GENERAL ===== */

body{
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #eefbf3, #dff5e7);
  font-family:'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  padding-top:12px !important;
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */

.hero{
  background: linear-gradient(135deg,#14532d,#22c55e);
  color:white;
  padding:60px 40px;
  border-radius:22px;
  text-align:center;
  margin-bottom:24px;
  box-shadow:0px 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:3rem;
  font-weight:800;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}

.hero p{
  max-width:700px;
  margin:auto;
  font-size:1.05rem;
  line-height:1.7;
  opacity:0.96;
}

/* ===== CONTENT CARD ===== */

.card-box{
  background:white;
  border-radius:18px;
  padding:28px;
  box-shadow:0px 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  border:1px solid #dcfce7;
  text-align:center;
}

/* ===== BLOG PLACEHOLDER ===== */

.placeholder{
  font-size:5rem;
  margin-bottom:15px;
}

.coming-soon{
  color:#166534;
  font-size:1.6rem;
  font-weight:700;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}

.description{
  color:#4b5563;
  max-width:650px;
  margin:auto;
  line-height:1.7;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */

.footer{
  text-align:center;
  margin-top:28px;
  padding:12px;
  color:#166534;
  font-size:0.95rem;
}

</style>

::: {.hero}

My Blog

Thoughts, analytics, visualizations, and learning experiences.

This section will include blog posts about data analytics, statistics, research projects, and personal development.

:::

::: {.card-box}

<div class="placeholder"> 📝 </div> <div class="coming-soon"> Blog Section Under Construction </div> <div class="description">

I am currently preparing content for this section.

Future posts will include:

Data Analytics Projects
Statistical Insights
Visualization Techniques
Research Experiences
Learning Notes & Reflections

Stay tuned for upcoming articles.

</div>

:::

<div class="footer">

Made with 💚 using R and Quarto

</div> ```
